name: eljassimi/curator
description: CURATOR storefront deployment marker for Hostinger.

post-install-cmd: if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build; else echo 'npm not found in Composer runtime, skipping Node build.'; fi
post-update-cmd: if command -v npm >/dev/null 2>&1; then npm install --no-audit --no-fund && npm run build; else echo 'npm not found in Composer runtime, skipping Node build.'; fi
